# Studio Notes: Ash Glazes & Reduction Firing

During our recent five-day wood firing, we experimented with natural pine ash glazes applied over unglazed stoneware bodies.

## Firing Dynamics

The introduction of pine wood ash at 1280°C creates dynamic, runny celadon drips across the shoulder of each vessel.

![Finished Reduction Vase](/assets/ceramic-vase.png)

Check out our [Wheel-Thrown Collection](../collection/wheel-thrown-vessels.md) or see our [Care Guide](../care-guide.md) for maintenance advice.
